completed: Fixed batch_initiation missing from Task model enum (400 Bad Request)
Fixed RoleGuard to check roleTags array for dual-role users (403 Forbidden)
Fixed faculty table full-reload: SSE handler now does targeted in-place updates instead of full refetch for single-approval events
Fixed student status stale cache: reduced TTL from 60s to 10s and added explicit invalidateStudentStatusCache calls in approveRequest, bulkApproveRequests, and markDue

decisions.context: Faculty table was reloading on every SSE event including own approval actions
decisions.decision: SSE handler now applies targeted optimistic update if event.approvalId+event.action are present; falls back to full refetch only for bulk=true events or cross-session changes
decisions.trade_offs: Slightly more complex SSE handler, but eliminates full table thrash on each action

decisions.context: Student portal showed stale status after approval due to 60s cache TTL
decisions.decision: Cache TTL reduced to 10s (dedup guard only) + explicit invalidation in all three approval handlers (approve, bulk-approve, mark-due)
decisions.trade_offs: Slightly more DB reads, but SSE-triggered refreshes now see current data within ~1s
